title: Day2 Session5, Alessio Buccino, SpikeInterface & SpikeForest: Spike sorting in large-scale recording
description:
Session V. Neuroscience Toolkits (open software + open science)
This session focused on open software and toolkits used in neuroscience research, emphasizing the intersection of open science and software development. Experts introduced and discussed various open-source software tools and frameworks used in neuroscience research. Talks covered software for data analysis, visualization, computational modeling, and collaborative platforms.
